data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Distributes user requests across multiple servers to ensure availability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Uses regional load balancers to optimize for low latency.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Google’s backend services are divided into microservices to enhance modularity.
data.technical_spec: Each service is independently deployable using Kubernetes.

data.title: Scalable Datastore
data.description: Google uses a distributed database that scales horizontally.
data.technical_spec: Bigtable and Spanner for different data workloads.

data.title: Global CDN
data.description: Utilizes a global content delivery network to minimize latency.
data.technical_spec: Edge servers around the world cache static content.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Designed to be operational 24/7 without downtime.
data.technical_spec: Redundancy and failover mechanisms in place.
